title: invoice — product analytics
note: This module IS the financial-record ledger. Its ANALYTICS.json declares product-analytics events that the growth::analytics lane emits about THIS MODULE's admin surfaces (invoice CRUD, credit-note issuance, report views, dunning intervention). Finance-lane events themselves (invoice.paid, membership.purchased) are LOAD-BEARING signals that go through the marketing lane (via #[AsDomainEventMapper]) — those are Lane 5, not Lane 4. This file is the growth::analytics feed about ADMIN USAGE of the invoicing UI.

events.name: Invoice Created
events.description: Admin manually created an invoice. Powers admin-workflow funnel + membership-linkage rate insight.

events.name: Invoice Finalized
events.description: Draft → open transition. days_from_creation_bucket signals workflow speed.

events.name: Invoice Paid
events.description: Load-bearing revenue event. Consent tier: essential (financial signal). Feeds ROAS + revenue-recognition funnels.

events.name: Invoice Voided
events.description: void_reason_category is bucketed: 'error', 'customer_cancelled', 'duplicate', 'other' (to bound cardinality — free-form void_reason not exported).

events.name: Invoice Uncollectible
events.description: P1 signal — every fire is a bad-debt loss. Consent tier: essential (financial-audit signal).

events.name: Credit Note Issued
events.description: Financial-record signal. Feeds refund-rate + adjustment-rate insight.

events.name: Invoice PDF Downloaded
events.description: Feeds insight on which invoices customers actually retrieve + how long after issue.

events.name: Invoice Mark Paid (Manual Reconciliation)
events.description: Signal for off-platform payments (check/wire/cash). Every fire is admin intervention.

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw total_cents / amount_cents — always the bucket (0-999 / 1000-9999 / 10000-99999 / 100000-999999 / 1000000+). Prevents cross-tenant revenue inference from aggregated data.
Analytics NEVER carry customer PII (billing_address, customer_tax_id). Customer identifiers are hashed if included (rare — customer_id is INTERNAL classification per data-classes.json).

The 'essential' consent tier for Invoice Paid + Invoice Uncollectible + Credit Note Issued + Invoice Sent To Collections + Invoice Written Off is deliberate — system-health + financial-audit signals cannot be opted out.

This file is DISTINCT from the marketing-lane declarations. The load-bearing InvoicePaid signal is captured server-side via CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent (marketing lane, #[AsDomainEventMapper] path). This analytics.json is the growth::analytics feed about the ADMIN EXPERIENCE of managing the invoice surface — a different lane, different consent, different retention.
